questionHtml: Once the germinated bean grows above the ground, state the process used by the bean in the production of starch.
markschemeHtml:
photosynthesis 

Do not accept condensation or polymerization; if list of processes given, mark the first answer.

meta.title: Once the germinated bean grows above the ground, state the process used by the bean in the production of starch.
